programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Jennifer is kidnapped by a man who wants to get some of the money from an old crime by holding his ex-partners wife who happens to be a dead ringer for Jennifer

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey head a task force to track down a pair of burglars posing as police officers

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky and Hutch try to bust Mr Amboy for his involvement in prostitution numbers and drugs despite their first Bicentennial bribery offer and the threat of a harassment charge

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: During Caitlins sorority reunion things go bad when a kidnapping is attempted

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan are transported to 1875 London where aided by an adventurous young writer they set out to reclaim a cursed object from a bloodthirsty killer

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Gabby refuses to mate his stallion with Roys horse When his horse runs away from the house he blames Roy and gets him jailed

programme.title: The Carson City Kid
programme.desc: The Carson City Kid Roy Rogers stops stagecoaches traveling between Wild West mining towns searching their mail sacks for letters addressed to Morgan Reynolds the man who killed his brother Discovering that Reynolds operates a saloon under the name Lee Jessup Bob Steele the Kid takes a job as the saloons bouncer While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison Pauline Moore the Kid discovers a swindled miner Noah Beery Jr who claims to be the Carson City Kid

programme.title: Addams Family 130
programme.desc: Addams Family 130

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa and Luke give Kate a break from her family chores including the cooking

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate is expecting some women from the Garden Club to visit and is nervous about them asking her to join Of course Grampa makes the wrong impression and Kate is sure that she will not get the invite

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Kay inherits country property in New York so Roger enters into an agreement to sell their California home and move The purchaser who works for the IRS threatens to sue the Posts if their behavior is not to is liking

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is suffering from feelings of rejection so he moves to the beach to live with a group of outcast beatniks Roger owns the beach property and he wants to evict the whole lot of them

programme.title: Rifleman 504
programme.desc: Rifleman 504

programme.title: Rifleman 425
programme.desc: Rifleman 425

programme.title: Gunsmoke S09E15 Dry Well
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S09E15 Dry Well

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Bonanza

programme.title: West 307
programme.desc: West 307

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man signs up people to a magazine subscription showing them his Congressional Medal of Honor to prove his honesty However it is a scam as there is no magazine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A pretty airline stewardess badly injures Kimble in a traffic accident and in his delirium he admits who he is and she helps him In turn Kimble helps her realize the married man shes dating is not right for her

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Greg will lie about anything to get a date with a hot girl but when she ends up being everything he has already lied about he must die Then her roommate wants to get ahead at work so is introduced her to a beauty czar who makes her exquisitely lovely which spells her downfall

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Painter Jack Craig gains himself a wealthy patron when he sells a morbid painting He soon finds that in order to please his patron he must continue to paint pictures of death - and this leads him down a murderous path

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Four boys find out that the local undertaker and a pharmacist are in cahoots to murder rich locals and profit from their funerals

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married Todd Fields teaches a high school photography class in a small quiet country town but aspires to work in a big city and gets led astray when he falls under the seductive spell of attractive new student Roseanne Lucas

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lew Bridgeman and Joe Caldwell are two longtime best friends who served together in the Vietnam War Lew and Joe wind clashing with each other over Lews fetching wife Rae whom both men are in love with

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A gorgeous but deadly dancer who manipulates men easily and kills for kicks succeeds in drawing Nick into her dangerous web

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan search for a cursed scarecrow that may be responsible for murder

programme.title: Howling III
programme.desc: A female werewolf runs away from her family and falls in love with a man who works in the movie business while a sociologist searches for proof of the werewolves existence

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to No More Mr Nice Guy the twin daughters of the cop who killed Freddy find that whenever one is attacked by the man of their dreams the other is wounded So the sisters team up to try to get Freddy out of their dreams for good

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways try to contact two astronauts in a space capsule orbiting over the island but they fail However they may get a second chance when an unmanned capsule they are trying to make contact with lands on the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa inherits some antique furniture from his recently deceased 94-year-old Uncle Willie

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Both Amos and George stoop to dirty politics while campaigning for a trip to San Francisco as a delegate representing the Ancient and Loyal Order of the Sons of the Mystic Nile

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Smart 521
programme.desc: Smart 521

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ Callie and Stacks help BJs old friend Steven Thomas Ulysses Nathaniel Travis complete the filming of his television pilot Buster Crabbe is outstanding as an aging stuntman with a secret

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gives away Ed to a prospective client in order to secure a home architecture job

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Eds having paternal feelings so he talks Wilbur into adopting a little pony as a son for him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Efforts to aid a Nazi generals assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: As the Hammelburg Underground lodges a complaint against Hogans success Klink finds himself caught between the Gestapo and the Wehrmacht each trying to take over Stalag 13

programme.title: Mchale 312
programme.desc: Mchale 312

programme.title: Mchale 311
programme.desc: Mchale 311

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer volunteers to train a German Shepherd named Killer intended for sentry duty but turns Killer into a pussycat

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job Of course what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find a headhunter tribes totem pole on the island The head on the top of it bears an uncanny resemblance to Gilligan--which comes in handy when the headhunters return to the island

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Mike Logan hires Dan to find his daughter Jennys rapist Bella discovers that the serial rapist targets slender blondes in their late teens When the rapist kills a victim Jenny becomes a witness and Bea becomes a decoy

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The old woman who runs the newsstand in Jonathans building is being blackmailed for a murder she may not have committed

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: An actress with a reputation as a man-eater stays at the Inn and takes a liking to George much to Dick and Joannas concern

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: When Michael goes to interview for a new job he puts the television stations receptionist in charge of Dicks show and she turns out to be a much better producer than Michael

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Defense budget cutbacks have Hollister targeted for possible shutdown MacGillis is put in charge of firing civilian staff

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans body conducts electricity after he is struck by lightning with a bowling ball in his hand But when The Professor tries to remove the bowling ball from Gilligans hand a second lightning strike makes him invisible

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Destiny annoys Mitch and Garner by relating her visions of a series of murders they are investigating until she sees that Ryan is the next victim

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy set out to repo a truck from a wealthy Texan but their mission backfires when the Sheriff arrives with a new arrest warrant that will send Froy away for good

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou takes his new guys on their very first repo but when the debtors attack with chainsaws Ronnie and Carlos are left to fend for themselves

programme.title: The Scarlet and The Black
programme.desc: Vatican efforts led by Monsignor Hugh OFlaherty to save Allied POWs and downed Allied airmen as the Nazis invade Rome

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: A man claiming to be the Dukes cousin from England Gaylord Duke asks Uncle Jesse for a 30000 advance to pay off the taxes for a piece of land he claims to have inherited But theres more to Gaylords story that he isnt exactly telling

programme.title: Hercules 215
programme.desc: Hercules 215

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam investigates the suspicious death of a banker which he saw in a dream It seems to be an exiled Taelon spirit that is contacting him Daan berates Zoor for his money and power hungry attitude

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne does some unauthorized research on a new kind of grain that will grow in any climate The billionaire who invented wants to sell it to the world Thinking poorer countries will be given money by richer countries But the aliens have their own plans for the grain after placing a new deadly poison in the grain they take over the body of the billionaire who suddenly offers it free to the world

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A rock singer tries to run away from the consequences of the morbid overtones in the lyrics of his songs after two fans committ suicide to the suggestions therein

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Can Will escape the wrath of guardians to a lost Mayan temple within the swamp when he is forced to be an unwilling guide

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Lambda waves permeate Moonbase Alpha causing instruments to malfunction and people to behave out of character Crew member Sally dies in mysterious circumstances Koenig is assailed by guilt-driven visions from his own past It eventually becomes clear that the Lambda Variant has amplified psychic abilities on the base in particular for Carolyn Powell whose lover was previously Sallys boyfriend and who is beset by jealous rage Dr Russell aids Koenig to overcome his own ghosts and prevent Carolyn from taking over the Moonbase

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Millionaire CJ Holmes is determined not to allow his daughter Suzy to marry farmer Fred Andrews When Suzy appeals to the Dukes for help CJs henchmen kidnap Uncle Jesse in a last-ditch effort to stop the wedding Jesse decides to teach the millionaire a lesson about the dedication and self-sacrifice of farmers

programme.title: Young 321
programme.desc: Young 321

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A terminally ill circus rigger is killed in his hospital bed by someone made up as a clown At first the detectives suspect the victims brother may have done it as a mercy killing but when the brother is murdered as well suspicion shifts to the nephew of the two men

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time The mission to recover two nuclear warheads belonging to General Rio Dominguez from a hotel vault in Santa Costa Jim and Willy sneak safe-cracker Terry Targo into the vault who figures out how to get out The team then captures Dominguez but Targos fingers are broken in the attempt With no other alternative Briggs has himself and Dominguez put into the vault and Briggs threatens to enter a random combination if Alicio doesnt tell him the code Dominguez breaks With the bombs defused Willy takes the warheads out of the vault Briggs remains behind and uses the information Targo gathered earlier to get out during a fireworks distraction set off by Barney Briggs and the rest of the team make a desperate race for safety and get onto a plane heading to safety seconds before the military can catch up to them

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: At an off-season motel a woman turns to Kimble for help with her son who is an unusually bright but troubled child Kimble helps the boy so much that when he has to run from the local sheriff the boy follows after imperiling them both

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As the powerful Barkley family and surrounding Valley community face the prospect of losing their land to a ruthless railroad baron a mysterious stranger arrives with life-changing news for the family

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne meets a sheriff he admires and a town he likes so he decides to stick around When he finds he has an agenda too that involves a pretty woman and some easy money he has second thoughts and a decision to make

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.desc: A group of random people are invited to a screening of a mysterious movie only to find themselves trapped in the theater with ravenous demons

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 26 filmed at the Art Hauser Centre in Prince Albert. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle in the cage. Brendan Mooney vs. Brad Lammy; Tyrone Halkett vs. Brad Campbell; Thomas Richardson vs. Cody Bowman; Evander Masuskapoe vs. Randell Martell; Devon Smith vs. Elias Cepeda.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 24 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The ZOCHI Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: My family has osterized me for being queer Meet the African princess whose gender preferences has cost her her family

programme.title: The April Taylor Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids accidentally find Zandoras Box which can open doorways to many other places This may be their best chance of getting home but only Zandora herself knows how to use the box and she is trapped somewhere inside it

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The team encounters a band of children from another planet whose spaceship might bring them all home The only problem is that the ship is in Vengers hands
